metadata.title: Onye Mwepụta Agba Site na Onyonyo n'efu – Paleti Site na Foto Ọ bụla
metadata.description: Bulite foto ma ọ bụ logo wee wepụta ruo agba isi 12 nwere koodu HEX na RGB. Zuru ezu maka UI, akara na mmekọrịta. Enweghị ndebanye aha, enweghị oke.

hero.title: Onye Mwepụta Agba Onyonyo – Nweta Paleti Site na Foto Ọ bụla
hero.description: Bulite foto, logo, ma ọ bụ onyonyo, ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-ewepụta ruo agba isi 12 nwere koodu HEX na RGB. Nyocha na-eme n'ime ihe nchọgharị gị.

software.name: Onye mwepụta agba onyonyo — onye emepụta paleti n'efu
alternateName: Wepụta paleti agba site na foto ma ọ bụ logo
software.description: Onye mwepụta agba onyonyo n'efu. Bulite foto, logo, ma ọ bụ onyonyo wee nweta paleti ruo agba isi 12 nwere koodu HEX na RGB. Nhazi na-eme n'ime ihe nchọgharị — a naghị eziga faịlụ gaa sava.
featureList: Ịwepụta agba isi ruo 12 na-akpaghị aka
Nyocha foto, logo, na onyonyo vector
Koodu agba na usoro HEX na RGB
Nkwado maka faịlụ PNG, JPG, na SVG
Ịhapụ pixel a na-ahụ site na ya na faịlụ PNG
Nhazi n'ime ihe nchọgharị — a naghị eziga onyonyo gaa sava

howTo.name: Otu esi ewepụta agba site na foto ma ọ bụ onyonyo
howTo.description: Otu esi ewepụta agba isi site na foto ma ọ bụ logo. Bulite onyonyo na usoro PNG, JPG, ma ọ bụ SVG, ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-emepụta paleti ruo agba 12 nwere koodu HEX.

steps.name: Bulite onyonyo
steps.text: Dọkpụrụ faịlụ tinye na mpaghara ahọpụtara ma ọ bụ họrọ onyonyo site na ngwaọrụ gị. Usoro a na-akwado: PNG, JPG, na SVG.

steps.name: Chere nyocha
steps.text: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-enyocha onyonyo na-akpaghị aka wee wepụta agba ndị isi.

steps.name: Detuo agba
steps.text: N'akụkụ agba ọ bụla ị ga-ahụ bọtịnụ idetuo — a na-edetuo koodu HEX gaa clipboard ngwaọrụ gị.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere ị ga-eji wepụta agba site na onyonyo?
contentBlocks.html:
Foto, logo, ma ọ bụ onyonyo ọ bụla nwere agba nke nwere ike ịrụ ọrụ dịka paleti agba emechara. Onye mwepụta ahụ na-enyocha onyonyo ma na-egosi agba ndị na-achị achị — nwere koodu HEX na uru RGB dị njikere imado n'ọrụ gị.

N'omume, nke a pụtara na kama ịhọrọ agba n'aka n'ime ngwa onyonyo (pixel site na pixel), ị na-ebulite otu onyonyo wee nweta ndepụta ahaziri nke ruo agba 12. Nke a bara uru mgbe ị na-ahọrọ agba maka weebụsaịtị, na-emepụta onyonyo mmekọrịta kwekọrọ, ma ọ bụ na-ewu ịmata anya site na ihe dị adị.

Nyocha niile na-eme n'ime ihe nchọgharị — a naghị eziga onyonyo gaa sava ọ bụla.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi eji onye mwepụta agba onyonyo
contentBlocks.description: Usoro niile na-ewe naanị nkeji ole na ole:

items.title: 1. Bulite onyonyo
items.description: Dọkpụrụ faịlụ tinye na mpaghara ahọpụtara ma ọ bụ họrọ site na ngwaọrụ gị. Usoro a na-akwado: PNG, JPG, na SVG.

items.title: 2. Chere nyocha
items.description: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ ga-enyocha onyonyo na-akpaghị aka wee wepụta ruo agba isi 12.

items.title: 3. Detuo agba ị chọrọ
items.description: N'akụkụ agba ọ bụla bọtịnụ idetuo dị — koodu HEX ma ọ bụ RGB na-aga clipboard a pụrụ imado ya ozugbo n'ọrụ gị.

contentBlocks.title: Kedu ka paleti agba ewepụtara si dị?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
#2C5F2D
#97BC62
#DAA520
#4169E1
#8B4513
#DC143C
#2F4F4F
#FF6347

Ihe atụ agba ewepụtara site na onyonyo ụwa
contentBlocks.html:
Mgbe ibulitechara onyonyo, onye mwepụta ahụ na-egosi ndepụta agba isi ahaziri site na nke na-achị achị kachasị ruo nke kachasị nta. Agba ọ bụla na-egosi koodu HEX ya na uru RGB — dị njikere imado na CSS, Figma, ma ọ bụ ngwa onyonyo ọ bụla.

Ọnụọgụ agba ewepụtara dabere na ọdịnaya onyonyo. Foto ala ga-ewepụta paleti bara ụba karịa (agba 8–12), ma logo dị mfe nwere agba abụọ ga-enye nsorita obere kwa.

contentBlocks.title: Onyonyo ole na-enye nsorita kacha mma n'onye mwepụta agba?
contentBlocks.description: Mma paleti ewepụtara dabere na ụdị onyonyo ebulitere:

items.title: Logo na onyonyo nwere paleti kọmpakịtị
items.description: Onyonyo nwere agba ole na ole nke ekewapụrụ nke ọma na-enye nsorita zuru ezu kachasị — onye mwepụta ahụ na-amata agba ọ bụla nke ọma.

items.title: Foto nwere ihe a na-elekwasị anya doro anya
items.description: Foto ngwaahịa, ime ụlọ, ma ọ bụ ala na-ewepụtakwa paleti bara uru, ma ha nwere ụdị agba karịa — gụnyere agba onyinyo na ìhè.

items.title: Faịlụ PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya
items.description: A na-ahapụ pixel a na-ahụ site na ya na-akpaghị aka n'oge nyocha. Ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ ịwepụta agba site na ihe naanị (dịka ọmụmaatụ, logo), jiri faịlụ PNG na-enweghị ndabere.

items.title: Onyonyo na-enweghị otu ndabere agba buru ibu
items.description: Mgbe ndabere na-ekpuchi ọtụtụ mpaghara onyonyo, agba ya na-achị nsorita. Tupu ibulite, tụlee ịkpụcha onyonyo gaa mpaghara ị nwere mmasị na ya.

contentBlocks.title: Kedu ka ịwepụta agba onyonyo si arụ ọrụ?
contentBlocks.description: Mgbe ebulitechara faịlụ, ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-eme ọtụtụ nzọụkwụ n'azụ — nyocha niile na-eme n'ime ihe nchọgharị:

items.title: Ịgbanwe nha onyonyo
items.description: A na-agbanwe nha onyonyo gaa ihe dịka 240 pixel obosara. Nke a na-eme ka nyocha dị ngwa ọ bụrụgodị maka foto buru nnọọ ibu, na-enweghị mmetụta na ịzụrụ oke nke ịchọpụta agba.

items.title: Ịchịkọta agba yiri ibe
items.description: A na-enyocha pixel ọ bụla, a na-ejikọta ụdị yiri ibe n'otu otu. Anụnụ abụọ fere yie ibe na-aghọ otu agba na paleti.

items.title: Ịhọrọ agba ndị isi
items.description: Algorithm ahụ na-ahọrọ agba ndị na-ekpuchi mpaghara kachasị ukwuu nke onyonyo. Nsorita bụ ndepụta ruo agba 12 ahaziri site na nke na-achị achị kachasị ruo nke kachasị nta.

items.title: Ịhapụ pixel a na-ahụ site na ya
items.description: Na faịlụ PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya, a naghị etinye mpaghara ndị ahụ na nyocha — onye mwepụta ahụ na-enyocha naanị agba a pụrụ ịhụ anya. Usoro niile na-ewekarị obere karịa otu nkeji.

items.title: Onye mwepụta weghachitere obere karịa agba 12
items.description: Ọnụọgụ agba ewepụtara dabere na ọdịnaya onyonyo. Logo dị mfe nwere agba abụọ ga-enye nsorita 2–3 — nke a bụ omume ziri ezi. Ngwa ọrụ ahụ anaghị etinye agba aghụghọ; ọ na-ewepụta naanị ndị dị n'onyonyo.

items.title: Agba a na-atụghị anya pụtara na paleti
items.description: Ndị a nwere ike ịbụ agba onyinyo, mgbanwe nwayọọ nwayọọ, ma ọ bụ ìhè — pixel na mpaghara ndị ahụ nwere agba dị iche na ihe a na-ahụ na nlele mbụ. Iji onyonyo nwere agba kwekọrọ karịa ma ọ bụ ịkpụcha mpaghara ojii ga-eme ka nsorita dị mma karịa.

items.title: Agba ndabere na-achị nsorita
items.description: Mgbe ndabere na-ekpuchi mpaghara karịa ihe n'onwe ya, agba ya ga-apụta na mbụ n'elu ndepụta. Ihe ọma: jiri faịlụ PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya ma ọ bụ kpuchaa onyonyo ka ihe ahụ were akụkụ buru ibu karịa nke freemu.

items.title: Onye mwepụta anaghị anabata faịlụ
items.description: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-akwado naanị usoro PNG, JPG, na SVG. Faịlụ na usoro ndị ọzọ (GIF, TIFF, HEIC, PDF) chọrọ ịgbanwe usoro tupu.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere onye mwepụta agba onyonyo a ji dị iche?

items.title: Nyocha nzuzo — onyonyo anaghị ahapụ kọmputa gị
items.description: Ịwepụta agba niile na-eme n'ime ihe nchọgharị. A naghị eziga onyonyo gaa sava ọ bụla, mgbe emechisịrị peeji, a na-ewepụ data n'ebe nchekwa.

items.title: Ruo agba isi 12 site n'otu onyonyo
items.description: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-ewepụta ruo agba 12 ahaziri site na nke na-achị achị kachasị — nke kwuru maka iwu paleti agba ọrụ zuru ezu.

items.title: Usoro onyonyo a ma ama atọ
items.description: Usoro a na-akwado: PNG, JPG, na SVG. Faịlụ PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya na-enye nsorita kacha mma n'ihi na a na-ahapụ pixel a na-ahụ site na ya na-akpaghị aka.

items.title: Koodu HEX na RGB dị njikere imado
items.description: Agba ọ bụla ewepụtara na-abịa nwere koodu HEX ya (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #2C5F2D) na uru RGB. Ị nwere ike idetuo koodu gaa clipboard imado ya ozugbo na CSS, Figma, ma ọ bụ Photoshop.

contentBlocks.title: Ebee ka ị nwere ike iji agba ewepụtara site na onyonyo

items.title: Iwu ịmata anya
items.description: Bulite foto na-akpali mmetụta akara — ala, ime ụlọ oriri, foto ngwaahịa — wee wepụta agba dịka ntọala maka paleti akara.

items.title: Onyonyo mmekọrịta
items.description: Wepụta agba site na foto ngwaahịa wee jiri ha dịka ndabere ma ọ bụ agba mgbakwụnye na onyonyo. Ederede dabere na agba site n'otu isi mmalite na-adị mma na profaịlụ.

items.title: Ịdakọrịta agba maka weebụsaịtị
items.description: Wepụta agba site na logo wee jiri ha dịka paleti agba peeji — agba isi, agba mmetụta, ụdị ndabere. Koodu HEX na-amado ozugbo na CSS.

items.title: Ịgbasawanye paleti dị adị
items.description: Ị nwere ike iji agba isi ewepụtara na onye emepụta paleti agba iji mepụta usoro zuru ezu nke agba kwekọrọ dabere na amamihe agba.

contentBlocks.title: Ajụjụ a na-ajụkarị gbasara onye mwepụta agba onyonyo

items.question: Onye mwepụta agba onyonyo ọ chọrọ ndebanye aha?
items.answer: Mba. Ngwa ọrụ ahụ bụ n'efu kpamkpam ma achọghị nbanye ma ọ bụ ndebanye aha. A na-enyocha onyonyo n'ime ihe nchọgharị — a naghị eziga ya gaa sava ọ bụla. Mgbe emechisịrị peeji, a na-ewepụ data niile.
items.answerSchemaText: Mba. Ngwa ọrụ ahụ bụ n'efu ma achọghị ndebanye aha. A na-enyocha onyonyo n'ime ihe nchọgharị.

items.question: Kedu ka onye mwepụta agba si dị iche na onye emepụta paleti?
items.answer: Onye mwepụta na-ewepụta agba site na onyonyo dị adị — ọ na-enyocha foto ma na-egosi agba ndị na-achị achị na ya. Onye emepụta paleti agba na-arụ ọrụ n'ụzọ ọzọ: ị na-enye otu agba isi, ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-emepụta usoro kwekọrọ dabere na amamihe agba. Ngwa ọrụ abụọ ndị a na-akwado ibe ha — ị nwere ike ịwepụta agba site na onyonyo mgbe ahụ jiri ya dịka isi na onye emepụta paleti.
items.answerSchemaText: Onye mwepụta na-ewepụta agba site na onyonyo. Onye emepụta na-emepụta paleti site n'agba isi. Ngwa ọrụ abụọ na-akwado ibe ha.

items.question: Ole agba ka onye mwepụta na-ewepụta site n'otu onyonyo?
items.answer: Ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-ewepụta ruo agba isi 12. Ọnụọgụ kpọmkwem dabere na ọdịnaya onyonyo — ọ bụrụ na onyonyo nwere naanị agba abụọ (dịka ọmụmaatụ, logo dị mfe), nsorita ga-adị obere kwa. A na-ahazi agba site na nke na-achị achị kachasị ruo nke kachasị nta.
items.answerSchemaText: Ruo agba isi 12, ahaziri site na nke na-achị achị kachasị ruo nke kachasị nta.

items.question: Usoro onyonyo ole ka onye mwepụta agba na-akwado?
items.answer: Usoro a na-akwado: PNG, JPG (JPEG), na SVG. Faịlụ PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya na-enye nsorita ka mma n'ihi na a na-ahapụ pixel a na-ahụ site na ya n'oge nyocha — ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-elekwasị anya na agba ihe n'onwe ya.
items.answerSchemaText: PNG, JPG, na SVG. PNG nwere ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya na-enye nsorita kacha mma.

items.question: N'ụzọ ole ka m ga-esi nweta koodu agba ewepụtara?
items.answer: A na-egosi agba ọ bụla nwere koodu HEX ya (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #2C5F2D) na uru RGB (dịka ọmụmaatụ, rgb(44, 95, 45)). Ị nwere ike idetuo koodu gaa clipboard imado ya ozugbo na CSS, Figma, Photoshop, ma ọ bụ ngwa onyonyo ọ bụla ọzọ.
items.answerSchemaText: HEX (dịka ọmụmaatụ, #2C5F2D) na RGB (dịka ọmụmaatụ, rgb(44, 95, 45)). Ị nwere ike idetuo gaa clipboard.

items.question: Enwere m ike idetuo agba paleti niile n'otu oge?
items.answer: Ugbu a ngwa ọrụ ahụ na-enye gị ohere idetuo agba otu otu — n'akụkụ agba ọ bụla bọtịnụ dị nke na-edetuo koodu HEX gaa clipboard. Ị nwere ike imado koodu edetuora ozugbo na Figma, Photoshop, CSS, ma ọ bụ ngwa ọ bụla ọzọ.
items.answerSchemaText: A na-edetuo agba otu otu site na bọtịnụ idetuo n'akụkụ agba ọ bụla.
